title: 利用 XML 結構建構客製化規準
prompt:
# Codex PPT Slide Image Prompt

## Canvas
{
  "type": "16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image",
  "language": "Chinese",
  "slide_number": 14,
  "render_slide_number": false
}

## Deck Goal
Explain how to construct and use AI-assisted grading systems for high school science lab reports under the 108 Curriculum.

## Required Background
{
  "deck_context": {
    "source_summary": "臺北市麗山高中林獻升老師研發的 AI 輔助高中自然科學探究與實作課程實驗報告評閱與學習評量系統建置實務。",
    "core_claim": "AI 可以顯著減輕教師批改負荷，但必須置於以教師為主體的人類參與迴圈（HITL）中，確保教學主體性。",
    "canonical_terms": [
      "探究與實作",
      "評量規準",
      "AI Agent",
      "提示詞工程",
      "後設提示詞",
      "人類參與迴圈",
      "信心分數",
      "字元錯誤率"
    ]
  }
}

## Global Style
{
  "name": "清爽專業自然風 (Style A)",
  "visual_direction": "clean, professional, academic, natural science training presentation",
  "color_palette": "Sage green (#5a7a6a) and soft light-green gradient as theme colors. Deep slate gray (#2d3748) for primary text. Amber (#b8894a) for tags and highlights. Soft light gray or off-white background with minimal card structures.",
  "typography": "Elegant Chinese Serif (Songti) for titles, clean Sans-serif (Heiti) for body text and bullet points."
}

## Style Reference Images To Inspect

- Style Reference 1: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助批改評分/2實驗報告批改/AI_Grading_PPT/origin_image/slide_08.png — approved sample slide style reference; match style only; do not copy layout or content

Inspect these images before generation to understand the approved deck style. Do not pass them to the image backend as input images unless this slide explicitly lists them under Input Images.

## Slide
{
  "number": 14,
  "title": "利用 XML 結構建構客製化規準",
  "role": "process",
  "intent": "Explain the benefit of XML formatting for LLM parsing."
}

## Text
{
  "title": "利用 XML 結構建構客製化規準",
  "key_points": [
    "結構化約束：採用 XML 標籤如 <rubric_template>, <criteria>, <performance_levels>",
    "XML 核心價值：確保規準對齊學習目標，並利於 AI 讀取與維持一致性",
    "教師微調：AI 生成規準草稿後，必須由教師依據具體課程目標微調"
  ],
  "speaker_focus": null
}

## Layout
{
  "composition": "code-block container next to flowchart"
}

## Visual Elements
{
  "main_visual": "minimal XML tag illustration"
}

## Style Reference Rule
Use the approved sample-slide style reference as visual guidance only. Match its palette, typography mood, density, texture, and overall visual identity. Do not copy its exact layout unless this slide's layout explicitly asks for it. For normal new slide generation, use the generate endpoint and express the inspected style through the prompt instead of attaching the sample as an edit input.

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent while varying layout by slide role.
- No watermark, unrelated logo, or extra slide number.

sample_generation_method.prompt_source: A professional 16:9 presentation slide with clean, academic design (Theme: Sage Green and Slate Gray, Style A). Background is off-white and soft light-gray, with subtle gradient of sage green (#5a7a6a) and soft organic round shapes.

sample_generation_method.input_context_preparation: inspect style references before generation; pass strict input assets with edit --image only when a slide job lists input_images
sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: Subagents must use this same backend/tool/config; use generate for new slides unless the assigned job has strict input_images or is a repair.
